originContent: CORE is your digital brain - a unified, always-on AI that remembers your context, works with your AI agents, and acts across your tools.
translatedContent: CORE is your digital brain—an integrated, always-on AI that remembers your context, collaborates with your AI agents, and operates across your tools.

originContent: Open source. Self-hostable. Your data, your control.
translatedContent: Open source. Self-hosted. Your data, your control.

originContent: Every conversation, decision, preference, and relationship is stored as structured knowledge in a temporal knowledge graph. Not raw text but classified facts (preferences, decisions, goals, directives) that surface exactly when you need them. Ask about something from weeks ago and the answer is there, with full context.
translatedContent: Every conversation, decision, preference, and relationship is stored as structured knowledge in a temporal knowledge graph. Not raw text, but classified facts (preferences, decisions, goals, directives) that appear precisely when you need them. Ask about something from weeks ago and the answer is there, with full context.

originContent: Create GitHub issues, send Slack messages, manage your calendar without leaving the conversation. Complex multi-step workflows too: ask your coding agent to check Sentry for new errors, create a GitHub issue for each one, assign the right engineer based on git blame, and post a summary to your team's Slack channel, all from a single prompt. 200+ actions across 50+ apps through one connection point.
translatedContent: Create GitHub issues, send Slack messages, manage your calendar without leaving the conversation. Complex multi-step workflows too: ask your coding agent to check Sentry for new errors, create a GitHub issue for each one, assign the right engineer based on git blame, and post a summary to your team's Slack channel, all from a single prompt. 200+ actions across 50+ apps through one connection point.

originContent: ### It Thinks and Works Across Systems
translatedContent: ### It Thinks and Works Across Systems

originContent: Your tools are siloed. Claude Code can't talk to your WhatsApp. Cursor can't check your calendar. CORE's Agent breaks these walls - it's the orchestrator that ties memory, toolkit, and your apps together.
translatedContent: Your tools are siloed. Claude Code can't talk to your WhatsApp. Cursor can't check your calendar. CORE's Agent breaks these walls - it's the orchestrator that ties memory, toolkit, and your apps together.

originContent: What the CORE Agent can do:
translatedContent: What the CORE Agent can do:

originContent: - **Understand intent**: classifies what you need and routes to the right tools and memory
translatedContent: - **Understand intent**: classifies what you need and routes to the right tools and memory

originContent: - **Spawn other agents**: spin up a Claude Code session or browser session from WhatsApp to fix a bug or research something
translatedContent: - **Spawn other agents**: spin up a Claude Code session or browser session from WhatsApp to fix a bug or research something

originContent: - **Coordinate multi-step workflows**: pull context from memory, act across multiple apps, and report back
translatedContent: - **Coordinate multi-step workflows**: pull context from memory, act across multiple apps, and report back

originContent: - **Work from anywhere**: message from WhatsApp, email, Slack, or the web dashboard — same brain, same context
translatedContent: - **Work from anywhere**: message from WhatsApp, email, Slack, or the web dashboard — same brain, same context

originContent: You shouldn't have to ask for everything. CORE monitors events - new emails, GitHub alerts, calendar changes — and evaluates them against what it knows about you. A client email arrives; CORE already knows how you handle that relationship and drafts the right response. A Sentry alert fires at night; CORE spins up a Claude Code session to investigate.
translatedContent: You shouldn't have to ask for everything. CORE monitors events - new emails, GitHub alerts, calendar changes — and evaluates them against what it knows about you. A client email arrives; CORE already knows how you handle that relationship and drafts the right response. A Sentry alert fires at night; CORE spins up a Claude Code session to investigate.

originContent: CORE is built on three layers that implement these four pillars:
translatedContent: CORE is built on three layers that implement these four pillars:

originContent: - **Memory**: A temporal knowledge graph that stores episodes, entities, and classified facts. Every piece of information is categorized (preference, decision, directive, goal, etc.) and connected over time. This is what makes retrieval intent-driven instead of keyword-based. [Docs →](https://docs.getcore.me/concepts/memory/overview)
translatedContent: - **Memory**: A temporal knowledge graph that stores episodes, entities, and classified facts. Every piece of information is categorized (preference, decision, directive, goal, etc.) and connected over time. This is what makes retrieval intent-driven instead of keyword-based. [Docs →](https://docs.getcore.me/concepts/memory/overview)

originContent: - **Toolkit**: A unified actions layer for any MCP-compatible agent. Connect your apps once (GitHub, Linear, Slack, Gmail, Calendar, etc.) and every connected AI tool gets access to 200+ actions through a single endpoint. [Docs →](https://docs.getcore.me/toolkit/overview)
translatedContent: - **Toolkit**: A unified actions layer for any MCP-compatible agent. Connect your apps once (GitHub, Linear, Slack, Gmail, Calendar, etc.) and every connected AI tool gets access to 200+ actions through a single endpoint. [Docs →](https://docs.getcore.me/toolkit/overview)

originContent: - **CORE Agent**: The orchestrator that ties memory and toolkit together. It understands intent, searches memory, picks tools, spawns other agents, and can act proactively based on triggers and rules. [Docs →](https://docs.getcore.me/concepts/meta-agent)
translatedContent: - **CORE Agent**: The orchestrator that ties memory and toolkit together. It understands intent, searches memory, picks tools, spawns other agents, and can act proactively based on triggers and rules. [Docs →](https://docs.getcore.me/concepts/meta-agent)

originContent: Talk to CORE from WhatsApp, email, or the web dashboard. It takes actions across your apps, manages your schedule, drafts emails, all with memory of who you are and how you work.
translatedContent: Talk to CORE from WhatsApp, email, or the web dashboard. It takes actions across your apps, manages your schedule, drafts emails, all with memory of who you are and how you work.

originContent: Give Claude Code, Cursor, and other AI tools persistent memory and actions. Your coding agent remembers project architecture, past decisions, and preferences across sessions. No more re-explaining context.
translatedContent: Give Claude Code, Cursor, and other AI tools persistent memory and actions. Your coding agent remembers project architecture, past decisions, and preferences across sessions. No more re-explaining context.

originContent: Restart Claude Code and run `/mcp` to authenticate.
translatedContent: Restart Claude Code and run `/mcp` to authenticate.

originContent: The plugin auto-loads your persona (preferences, rules, decisions) at every session start and ingests conversations into memory when you're done.
translatedContent: The plugin auto-loads your persona (preferences, rules, decisions) at every session start and ingests conversations into memory when you're done.

originContent: claude mcp add --transport http --scope user core-memory https://app.getcore.me/api/v1/mcp?source=Claude-Code
translatedContent: claude mcp add --transport http --scope user core-memory https://app.getcore.me/api/v1/mcp?source=Claude-Code

originContent: Then type `/mcp` and open core-memory for authentication.
translatedContent: Then type `/mcp` and open core-memory for authentication.

originContent: Set your API key via environment variable or config:
translatedContent: Set your API key via environment variable or config:

originContent: Get your API key from [app.getcore.me](https://app.getcore.me) → Settings → API Key.
translatedContent: Get your API key from [app.getcore.me](https://app.getcore.me) → Settings → API Key.

originContent: 2. Navigate to Settings → Connectors → Add custom connector
translatedContent: 2. Go to Settings → Connectors → Add custom connector

originContent: 3. Click "Connect" and grant Claude permission to access CORE
translatedContent: 3. Click "Connect" and grant Claude permission to access CORE

originContent: **30+ more providers** — Windsurf, VS Code, Cline, Codex, Gemini CLI, Copilot, and more. [See all setup guides →](https://docs.getcore.me/providers/overview)
translatedContent: **30+ more providers** — Windsurf, VS Code, Cline, Codex, Gemini CLI, Copilot, and more. [See all setup guides →](https://docs.getcore.me/providers/overview)

originContent: Sync your ChatGPT and Gemini conversations into CORE via browser extension. Searchable, reusable, and available to every connected agent.
translatedContent: Sync your ChatGPT and Gemini conversations into CORE via browser extension. Searchable, reusable, and available to every connected agent.

originContent: 2. **Connect Gmail & Calendar** — CORE scans them to learn about you so your digital brain starts with real context from day one
translatedContent: 2. **Connect Gmail & Calendar** — CORE scans them to learn about you so your digital brain starts with real context from day one

originContent: 3. **Start using** — talk to CORE Agent, connect your AI tools, or take actions in your apps
translatedContent: 3. **Start using** — talk to CORE Agent, connect your AI tools, or take actions in your apps

originContent: Building AI agents? Offload memory and integrations to CORE so you can focus on your agent's logic.
translatedContent: Building AI agents? Offload memory and integrations to CORE so you can focus on your agent's logic.

originContent: - **Offload memory** — Use CORE's temporal knowledge graph as your agent's long-term memory. Store conversations, retrieve context with intent-driven search, and let your agent build knowledge over time without managing your own vector DB or graph.
translatedContent: - **Offload memory** — Use CORE's temporal knowledge graph as your agent's long-term memory. Store conversations, retrieve context with intent-driven search, and let your agent build knowledge over time without managing your own vector DB or graph.

originContent: - **Offload integrations** — Connect apps once in CORE, and your agent gets MCP tools for all of them. No OAuth flows to build, no API maintenance, no per-integration code.
translatedContent: - **Offload integrations** — Connect apps once in CORE, and your agent gets MCP tools for all of them. No OAuth flows to build, no API maintenance, no per-integration code.

originContent: - **Build via MCP or API** — Connect your agent to CORE via MCP (single endpoint) or use the REST API directly.
translatedContent: - **Build via MCP or API** — Connect your agent to CORE via MCP (single endpoint) or use the REST API directly.

originContent: - [**core-cli**](https://github.com/RedPlanetHQ/core-cli) — Task manager agent with memory and Linear/GitHub sync
translatedContent: - [**core-cli**](https://github.com/RedPlanetHQ/core-cli) — Task manager agent with memory and Linear/GitHub sync

originContent: - [**holo**](https://github.com/RedPlanetHQ/holo) — Turn your CORE memory into a personal website with chat
translatedContent: - [**holo**](https://github.com/RedPlanetHQ/holo) — Turn your CORE memory into a personal website with chat

originContent: CORE achieves **88.24%** average accuracy on the LoCoMo benchmark across single-hop, multi-hop, open-domain, and temporal reasoning tasks.
translatedContent: CORE achieves **88.24%** average accuracy on the LoCoMo benchmark across single-hop, multi-hop, open-domain, and temporal reasoning tasks.

originContent: CASA Tier 2 Certified — third-party audited to meet Google's OAuth requirements.
translatedContent: CASA Tier 2 Certified — third-party audited to meet Google's OAuth requirements.

originContent: - Your data is never used for AI model training
translatedContent: - Your data is never used for AI model training
